site.title: Sabro
site.tagline: A platform for the Syriac language

home.lede: Sabro is the hub of a growing ecosystem of apps for the Syriac language — starting with Meltho, a daily Syriac word game.

meltho.heading: Meltho
meltho.body: A daily Syriac word game — guess the hidden word in six tries. The first app on the platform.

home.aboutBody: Sabro is the backbone of an ecosystem dedicated to the Syriac language. It owns shared identity, user profiles, a Syriac lexicon, and the public API the ecosystem’s apps build on — beginning with Meltho.
home.statusBody: Meltho, a daily Syriac word game, is the first app to launch on the platform. More apps for the Syriac language will follow.

auth.signInHint: Sign in with your account to view this content.

translations.title: Translations
translations.signInRequired: Sign in to browse the translations.

segments.heading: Segments
segments.empty: This source has no segments yet.

library.title: Word library
library.heading: Meltho word library
library.lede: Every word Meltho has shown, with its letters and sounds.
library.empty: No past words yet — check back after today's puzzle.
library.loadFailed: Could not load the word library.
library.notFound: This word is not in the library yet.

composition.heading: Letter by letter
composition.none: Add a vocalized form to this word to see its letters broken down.

rule.computedHard: hard at the start or after a vowelless letter (computed)

admin.adminRequiredHint: Sign in with an editor account to manage the lexicon.

lexicon.title: Lexicon backoffice
lexicon.subtitle: Manage the Syriac lexical database and the Meltho word pool.
lexicon.empty: No lexicon entries yet. Create the first one.
lexicon.saveFailed: Could not save the entry. Check the highlighted fields.
lexicon.actionFailed: The action could not be completed.
lexicon.deleteConfirm: Delete this entry permanently? This cannot be undone.

form.syriacUnvocalizedHint: Required. Base text without vowel points.
form.sblTransliterationHint: Optional enrichment; does not gate publication.
form.transliterationVariantsHint: Comma-separated accepted spellings for search tolerance.
form.meaningsHint: English, French and Dutch are all required to publish.
form.playableLengthHint: Counted from the unvocalized form. The Meltho pool accepts 2–8 letters.

lifecycle.heading: Lifecycle
lifecycle.publishHint: Publishing requires English, French and Dutch meanings.
lifecycle.poolHint: Only published entries of 2–8 letters can join the Meltho pool.
